effect: Missing kills runtime; red lamp indicator; Relink primary. Highest priority — supersedes everything. Subtype affects tooltip + retry strategy (subtype detail parked)

source_of_truth: own × click OR parent SUB=off cascade OR parent enabled=no cascade
persisted: no (derived from causes, but own × persists as config flag)
effect: Runtime off; row-level dashed visual (no indicator lamp); ×+relink+LBL alive; toggles store-not-apply (stored values reapplied when row re-enables)
user_value: medium — "row off by user or cascade"

source_of_truth: import in-flight (auto-import OR manual Sync All)
effect: Race-prevention lock: ×+toggles locked (visual press ok, no effect); LBL alive (idempotent on processed items, applies to in-flight); spinner indicator. Scan-only operations silent — not a state
Auto-import preference. Orthogonal to state: healthy row with EYE=off still has path monitored for fs events, but new files NOT imported
Recursion control. on = walker recurses into subdirs. off = own files only; children become enabled=no via cascade. Does NOT affect own row's enabled state — SUB is cause, not state
Label text + Premiere color. Always editable (even under Busy: idempotent on already-processed items, applies to in-flight imports). Orthogonal to state

source_of_truth: Premiere recovery block / stuck imports / external impairment
effect: Global plugin-level state above row states. Message: "Import blocked — restart Premiere". Not in MVP scope — row model treats this as invisible and imports silently fail until user acts
